summary: Made two surgical seam edits: reframed the opening around Ina's immediate action and prior-chapter notebook carryover, and added a late-chapter Hyejin text cue to bridge into the Chapter 12 storage entry.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to begin with Ina awake on the floor, preserving setting details while using a distinct entry scaffold from adjacent weather-arrival openings.
Inserted a notebook callback line ("GET HER OUT, THEN PAY WHAT IT COSTS") to tighten continuity from Chapter 10's closing beat.
